notes: Tiny 3-declaration wrapper file that packages the generic K(E)-rational point of the base-changed curve W_KE; all proofs are one-liners delegating to MulByIntPullback infrastructure. Note that MulByIntPullback.lean already contains a private duplicate `generic_nonsingular'` (line 95) with the same proof body, suggesting this file exists purely to expose a public API surface.
